title: Card
description: A container component used for grouping content together in a modular way. Often used for displaying summaries, images, or interactive content.
summary: A flexible container for organizing and displaying content in a structured format.

body.raw:
## Usage

Basic usage example to quickly see how the `Card` works.

<CardDemosUsage />

## API References

### Styles API

```ts
type T = "footer" | "header" | "title" | "content" | "root" | "description";
```

| Styles API    | Type                                | Default     | Annotation                                    |
| ------------- | ----------------------------------- | ----------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| unstyled`?`   | `Partial<Record<T, boolean>>`       | `false`     | if `true`, all default styles will be removed |
| classNames`?` | `Partial<Record<T, string>>`        | `undefined` | Set className for `T`                         |
| styles`?`     | `Partial<Record<T, CSSProperties>>` | `undefined` | Set style for `T`                             |

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup and styles.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the component immediately.

<SourceCodes name="card" />

`,(0,r.jsx)(s,{name:"card",code:`"use client";\r
import * as React from "react";\r
import { cvx, type cvxVariants } from "xuxi";\r
import { cn } from "@/utils/cn";\r
\r
const classes = cvx({\r
  variants: {\r
    selector: {\r
      root: "relative rounded-lg border bg-background text-muted-foreground shadow-sm",\r
      header: "flex flex-col space-y-1.5 p-6",\r
      title: "text-2xl font-semibold leading-none tracking-tight",\r
      description: "text-sm text-muted-foreground",\r
      content: "p-6 pt-0",\r
      footer: "flex items-center p-6 pt-0"\r
    }\r
  }\r
});\r
\r
type __CardSelector = NonNullable<cvxVariants<typeof classes>["selector"]>;\r
type Options = StylesNames<__CardSelector> & {};\r
type CSSProperties = React.CSSProperties & { [key: string]: any };\r
type NestedRecord<U extends [string, unknown], T extends string> = {\r
  [K in U as K[0]]?: Partial<Record<T, K[1]>>;\r
};\r
type Styles = ["unstyled", boolean] | ["classNames", string] | ["styles", CSSProperties];\r
type StylesNames<T extends string, Exclude extends string = never> = Omit<NestedRecord<Styles, T> & { className?: string; style?: CSSProperties }, Exclude>;\r
type ComponentProps<T extends React.ElementType, Exclude extends string = never> = StylesNames<__CardSelector> & {\r
  color?: React.CSSProperties["color"];\r
} & React.PropsWithoutRef<Omit<React.ComponentProps<T>, "style" | "color" | Exclude>>;\r
\r
type CtxProps = {\r
  getStyles(selector: __CardSelector, options?: StylesNames<__CardSelector>): InferType<typeof getStyles>;\r
} & NestedRecord<Styles, __CardSelector>;\r
\r
function getStyles(selector: __CardSelector, options?: Options) {\r
  return {\r
    "data-card": cn(selector),\r
    className: cn(!options?.unstyled?.[selector] && classes({ selector }), options?.classNames?.[selector], options?.className),\r
    style: { ...options?.styles?.[selector], ...options?.style }\r
  };\r
}\r
\r
const ctx = React.createContext<CtxProps | undefined>(undefined);\r
const useCard = () => React.useContext(ctx)!;\r
\r
const Edge = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, ComponentProps<"div"> & { selector: __CardSelector }>((_props, ref) => {\r
  const { unstyled, className, classNames, style, styles, selector, ...props } = _props;\r
  const ctx = useCard();\r
  const Cmp: React.ElementType = selector === "title" ? "h3" : "div";\r
  const _getStyles = ctx?.getStyles ?? getStyles;\r
  const stylesApi = { unstyled: ctx?.unstyled ?? unstyled, classNames: ctx?.classNames ?? classNames, styles: ctx?.styles ?? styles };\r
  return <Cmp {...{ ref, ..._getStyles(selector, { className, style, ...stylesApi }), ...props }} />;\r
});\r
Edge.displayName = "Card/Edge";\r
\r
export const CardHeader = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, ComponentProps<"div">>((props, ref) => <Edge {...{ ref, selector: "header", ...props }} />);\r
CardHeader.displayName = "CardHeader";\r
\r
export const CardTitle = React.forwardRef<HTMLHeadingElement, ComponentProps<"h3">>((props, ref) => <Edge {...{ ref, selector: "title", ...props }} />);\r
CardTitle.displayName = "CardTitle";\r
\r
export const CardDescription = React.forwardRef<HTMLParagraphElement, ComponentProps<"p">>((props, ref) => <Edge {...{ ref, selector: "description", ...props }} />);\r
CardDescription.displayName = "CardDescription";\r
\r
export const CardContent = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, ComponentProps<"div">>((props, ref) => <Edge {...{ ref, selector: "content", ...props }} />);\r
CardContent.displayName = "CardContent";\r
\r
export const CardFooter = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, ComponentProps<"div">>((props, ref) => <Edge {...{ ref, selector: "footer", ...props }} />);\r
CardFooter.displayName = "CardFooter";\r
\r
export interface CardProps extends ComponentProps<"div", "content"> {\r
  title?: string;\r
}\r
export const Card = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, CardProps>(function Card(_props, ref) {\r
  const { children, unstyled, classNames, styles, ...props } = _props;\r
  // const childrens = React.Children.map(children, child => React.isValidElement(child) ? React.cloneElement(child, { unstyled, classNames, styles }) // Forward classNames : child);\r
  return (\r
    <ctx.Provider value={{ getStyles, unstyled, classNames, styles }}>\r
      <Edge {...{ ref, selector: "root", unstyled, classNames, styles, ...props }}>{children}</Edge>\r
    </ctx.Provider>\r
  );\r
}) as CardComponent;\r
Card.displayName = "Card";\r
\r
// Export as a composite component\r
type ForwardRef<T extends React.ElementType, Props> = React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<{ ref?: React.ComponentPropsWithRef<T>["ref"] } & Props>;\r
type CardComponent = ForwardRef<"div", CardProps> & {\r
  Header: typeof CardHeader;\r
  Title: typeof CardTitle;\r
  Description: typeof CardDescription;\r
  Content: typeof CardContent;\r
  Footer: typeof CardFooter;\r
};\r
// Attach sub-components\r
Card.Header = CardHeader;\r
Card.Title = CardTitle;\r
Card.Description = CardDescription;\r
Card.Content = CardContent;\r
